jsonLd.title: Ustraa is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!
